title: cracca stipularis
intro: Cracca stipularis, also known as the Tick-trefoil or Stipule tick trefoil, is a perennial plant in the legume family (Fabaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca stipularis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
